title: Theo's Sleepy Peek-a-Boo
synopsis: Little Theo plays peek-a-boo with his favorite bedtime friends as he gets ready for sleep, discovering cozy surprises behind curtains, blankets, and pillows.

pages.text: Time for bed, little Theo! But where are all your sleepy friends hiding?

illustration.description: Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes stands in a cozy bedroom with a curtain partially covering a window, a blanket draped over a chair, and pillows arranged on the bed, suggesting hidden surprises
illustration.alt: Theo in a bedroom with hidden objects

pages.text: Peek-a-boo behind the curtain! There's Mr. Moon smiling down at you.

illustration.description: Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes pulling back a blue curtain to reveal a smiling crescent moon in the window, with the curtain creating a peek-a-boo effect
illustration.alt: Theo revealing the moon behind a curtain

pages.text: Who's hiding under the soft blanket? It's your teddy bear, ready for cuddles!

illustration.description: Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes lifting a corner of a fluffy blanket to reveal a brown teddy bear partially hidden underneath, creating a surprise reveal moment
illustration.alt: Theo finding his teddy bear under a blanket

pages.text: Peek-a-boo behind the pillow! Your sleepy bunny is waiting for sweet dreams.

illustration.description: Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes moving a white pillow aside to discover a soft toy bunny partially concealed behind it on the bed
illustration.alt: Theo discovering a toy bunny behind a pillow

pages.text: Now all your friends are here. Time to snuggle close and drift to sleep. Good night, Theo!

illustration.description: Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes lying in bed surrounded by his teddy bear and bunny, with the moon visible through the window and a peaceful bedtime scene
illustration.alt: Theo sleeping peacefully with his toys

metadata.illustrationStyle: lift the flap inspired, partially hidden objects, peek-a-boo composition, hiding and revealing, interactive feel, surprise element, behind the curtain, playful concealment

questions.question: What did Theo find behind the curtain?
questions.explanation: Theo found Mr. Moon smiling behind the curtain!

questions.question: Where was the teddy bear hiding?
questions.explanation: The teddy bear was hiding under the soft blanket, ready for cuddles!

questions.question: What was behind the pillow?
questions.explanation: The sleepy bunny was waiting behind the pillow for sweet dreams!
